summary: The diff correctly fixes the UPI payment deep links in both UpiPaymentButtons.tsx and UpiPaymentOptionsModal.tsx. GPay uses 'tez://upi/pay?', PhonePe uses 'phonepe://pay?', and Paytm uses 'paytmmp://upi/pay?' — all matching the required URI schemes closely. Both files are updated, no UI layout or other functionality appears changed. One minor note: the build request specifies 'paytmmp://pay?' for Paytm but the implementation uses 'paytmmp://upi/pay?' — this is a slight deviation but likely more correct in practice.

hallucinated_features.description: iOS App Store fallback logic: when on iOS, the code sets a setTimeout to redirect to the App Store if the app does not open within 2 seconds.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to fix the deep link URI schemes (tez://, phonepe://, paytmmp://) and did not request any iOS fallback or App Store redirect behavior.
